extensionDescription.message: Generate natural, context-aware replies on X using your preferred AI model.

defaultModelHint.message: Leave blank to use the recommended default.

voicePlaceholder.message: Example: Indie developer; direct and calm, without internet slang. You can also paste a few replies you like.

voiceHint.message: Stored locally and used only to match your identity and tone.

privacyText.message: Keys stay on this device. Post content and enabled images are sent to your selected AI provider when generating a reply.

visionCustomModel.message: Make sure the custom model supports images

visionModelEnabled.message: Let the model understand images before replying

contextExpired.message: The extension context expired, usually after an extension reload. Refresh this X page and try again.

refreshAndRetry.message: {0} (refresh this X page and try again)

imageNotSentNoKey.message: Images not sent · No Key configured

missingKey.message: No {0} Key is configured. Open Quip settings and add one first.

imageNotSentUnsupported.message: Images not sent · {0} has no image support

providerCannotReadImages.message: {0} cannot read images. Switch to OpenAI, Grok, or Claude, or turn off Read post images.

contextSending.message: Sending {0} parent post(s) and {1} image(s) to {2}…

imagesDisabled.message: Images not sent · Image reading is off

contextSent.message: ✓ Request included {0} parent post(s) and {1} image(s)

postNotFound.message: Could not read the post being replied to.

composerNotFound.message: Could not find the reply box.

imageSendUnconfirmed.message: Request failed · Image delivery not confirmed
